# 2Flow — llms.txt
# https://2flow.ie

## About

2Flow is Ireland's specialist eCommerce fulfilment partner, based in Dublin.
We provide end-to-end third-party logistics (3PL) services for direct-to-consumer
and DTC brands shipping from Ireland.

## What We Do

- Pick and pack fulfilment for eCommerce orders
- Kitting and product assembly
- Returns processing and management
- Same-day order dispatch from our Dublin hub
- Inbound stock management and check-in
- Amazon FBA preparation
- Shopify-native fulfilment integration
- International shipping (Ireland, UK, EU, global)

## Who We Serve

Irish eCommerce brands and DTC businesses shipping 500–10,000+ orders per month.
Typical customers: health and beauty brands, subscription box businesses,
supplements, cosmetics, and lifestyle product companies.

## Key Facts

- Based in Dublin, Ireland
- Specialise in Irish market fulfilment
- Integrated with Mintsoft WMS and Shopify
- Carrier partners include DPD and An Post
- Full ownership model: inbound stock through to customer delivery and returns
